access_token.description: Productboard API access token, sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>'. Never logged.

base_url.description: Productboard API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound sent as 'updated_since' on the first request of every stream, when set. Not a stateful incremental cursor: legacy applies this as a static, config-driven filter only, with no per-sync cursor advancement.
